name: COMPX INTERNATIONAL INC
summary: CompX International Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated manufacturer of security products and marine components. Security products include mechanical and electrical cabinet locks for postal, office furniture, tool storage, and healthcare applications. Marine components include wake enhancement systems, stainless steel exhaust systems, gauges, throttle controls, and trim tabs for recreational marine and other industries. Products are designed for medium to high-end applications where design, quality, and durability are valued.

products.name: Disc Tumbler Locks
products.description: Moderate security cabinet locks representing the lowest cost lock produced by CompX.

products.name: Pin Tumbler Locks
products.description: Higher security locks including KeSet, System 64, TuBar, and Turbine product lines.

products.name: CompX eLock
products.description: Electronic lock providing stand-alone or networked security with audit trail for drug storage via proximity card or other credentials.

products.name: StealthLock
products.description: Electronic lock for secure narcotics and valuables storage with keypad or credential-based access.

products.name: NARC iD
products.description: Integrated inventory and access control secured narcotics box for healthcare applications.

products.name: Wake Enhancement Systems
products.description: Specialty marine devices for ski/wakeboard and performance boats including SlamCAM and ecoForce systems.

products.name: Stainless Steel Exhaust Systems
products.description: OEM and aftermarket exhaust headers, pipes, and mufflers for recreational marine applications.

products.name: Marine Gauges
products.description: High performance gauges including GPS speedometers and tachometers for marine use.

products.name: Throttle Controls
products.description: Mechanical and electronic controls and throttles for marine and other industries.

products.name: Trim Tabs
products.description: Billet aluminum trim tabs and steering wheels for ski/wakeboard and performance boats.

products.name: STOCK LOCKS
products.description: Standardized lock product line distributed through North American locksmith and OEM distributor network.
